candidateScores.business: Mitchell's Sunset Beach Used Auto Parts & Repair
candidateScores.signal: OSM landuse/listing signal only; no contact details found

leads.gmbSignals: Nominatim/OSM public listing surfaced shop/car_repair category, address 1405 East 14th Street, Des Moines, website https://maxiosautorepair.business.site/, phone +1 515-528-2450. Google rating not visible in this pass.
leads.contactRoute: phone/manual research; no public email found
verifiedEvidence: Direct fetch of https://maxiosautorepair.business.site/ returned HTTP 404 with title 'Error 404 (Not Found)!!1'.
Public listing phone +1 515-528-2450 and address 1405 East 14th Street, Des Moines were present in Nominatim/OSM data.
unsafeOrUnverifiedClaims: exact service menu beyond auto repair category
leads.diagnosis: A public website click appears to land on a Google 404, so mobile searchers do not get address confidence, service context, or a tap-to-call path.
leads.bestHook: Helpful alert: the public Business Site URL is not loading as a real shop page.
leads.whyThisShouldClose: Specific public bug in a high-intent auto repair category; the mockup makes the fix visible without criticizing their work.
leads.mockupDecisionReason: A visual concept is useful because the current click path is a 404; the page shows the minimum useful replacement.
leads.designDifferentiation: Warm work-order/ticket-board design with address confidence and symptom routing; avoids generic mechanic hero, fake reviews, and fake ASE/trust badges.
leads.visualQaNotes: Local browser QA passed: distinct work-order concept, no fake proof, mobile sticky call dock visible, strong sample framing. Add real shop photos/hours/verified service list before production.
leads.subject: quick website 404 note for Maxio's Auto Repair
leads.draftCopy:
Hi Maxio's Auto Repair team — I found a public website link for Maxio's that opened to a Google 404 page instead of a shop page. If that is what customers click from search, they may not see your address, phone, or repair info before choosing where to go.

I made a sample concept showing a cleaner first screen with your public phone, Des Moines address, and a simple mobile call path: https://sybeorg-mockups.vercel.app/maxios-auto-repair/

If the direction is useful, I can clean this up with the real details.

leads.gmbSignals: Nominatim/OSM public listing surfaced craft/plumber, West Des Moines address, official website; phone/rating not visible in this pass.
verifiedEvidence: Official site fetch returned HTTP 403 Cloudflare Attention Required in this automated pass; do not call this broken in copy without manual browser verification.
unsafeOrUnverifiedClaims: site is broken for all users
leads.diagnosis: Potential friction if protective/bot-blocking layer or site experience interferes with visitors; needs manual browser/GMB verification before outreach.
leads.bestHook: Offer a quick mobile/service-path audit rather than a bug accusation.
leads.whyThisShouldClose: Local high-intent trade, but evidence is not strong enough for mockup-led outreach yet.
leads.mockupDecisionReason: Skipped; Cloudflare result is not enough to build a credible custom concept.
leads.subject: quick mobile service-page idea for Holt Plumbing & Heating
leads.draftCopy:
Hi Holt Plumbing & Heating team — I was reviewing West Des Moines plumbing/heating listings and wanted to flag a simple opportunity: making the mobile path from search to the right service call as clear as possible. I would want to verify a couple details manually before sending anything specific.

If useful, I can put together a short audit or sample service page focused on calls from mobile search. If this is useful, I can send the details over.

leads.gmbSignals: Nominatim/OSM public listing surfaced craft/plumber, website, phone +1 319-363-7533; official site itself shows functional Cedar Rapids plumbing/HVAC positioning.
leads.contactRoute: contact form/phone/manual; no public email found
verifiedEvidence: Official site loaded HTTP 200 with title Cedar Rapids Plumbing & HVAC Company | Master Plumbing, Heating & Cooling.
Automated HTML fetch surfaced placeholder phone-like strings such as (000) 000-0000 alongside real numbers; requires visual confirmation before outreach.
leads.diagnosis: Possible site QA/placeholder data issue, but not severe enough for mockup before manual confirmation.
leads.bestHook: Helpful technical QA note if visual/manual check confirms placeholder strings are public.
leads.whyThisShouldClose: Specific QA issues can get replies, but the business already has a functional site so copy must be precise.
leads.recommendedChannel: manual verification, then contact form/phone script
leads.mockupDecisionReason: Skipped; existing site is robust and a generic mockup would weaken positioning.
leads.subject: quick website QA note for Master Plumbing
leads.draftCopy:
Hi Master Plumbing team — I was checking Cedar Rapids plumbing/HVAC sites and noticed a possible small website QA issue in the page code: placeholder phone-like strings appeared alongside real contact numbers. I would want to verify it visually before calling it a public issue, but it may be worth a quick cleanup check.

If useful, I can send a concise audit with the exact spots to review. If this is useful, I can send the details over.

leads.gmbSignals: Nominatim/OSM public listing surfaced craft/plumber, website, phone +1 319-365-6977. Public rating not visible in this pass.
leads.contactRoute: phone/contact form/manual; no public email found
verifiedEvidence: Official site loaded HTTP 200 and redirected to valentaplumbing.com with title 'Valenta Plumbing – A full-service plumbing and heating contractor'.
leads.diagnosis: Functional older site; likely better approached with a focused water-heater/drain/seasonal landing page than a homepage redesign.
leads.bestHook: One high-intent service page could be easier than a full website pitch.
leads.whyThisShouldClose: Plumbing service pages have direct lead value and avoid insulting an existing functional site.
leads.mockupDecisionReason: Skipped; need identify exact missing high-value service page and collect real proof before building.
leads.subject: quick service-page idea for Valenta Plumbing
leads.draftCopy:
Hi Valenta Plumbing team — I came across your Cedar Rapids site today. Nothing urgent or negative here; the opportunity I noticed is more specific: a focused page for a high-intent service like water heaters, drain issues, or heating/plumbing repair could give search visitors a clearer path than a general homepage.

If useful, I can mock up one service-page concept using only verified info from your site. If the direction is useful, I can clean this up with the real details.

leads.gmbSignals: Nominatim/OSM public listing surfaced business name/location around 17th Avenue Southwest / Cedar Rapids but no website, phone, email, or rating in this pass.
verifiedEvidence: Public listing data showed name/location but no website/phone fields in this pass.
leads.diagnosis: Potential local profile leakage: if a roofing/siding business has no website or phone in a public listing, storm/repair searchers have no clear next step.
leads.bestHook: Profile/contact-path cleanup after confirming active contact details.
leads.whyThisShouldClose: Roofing is high-ticket and seasonal, but contact details must be verified before outreach.
leads.mockupDecisionReason: Skipped; no contact route or real assets yet, so a mockup would be generic.
leads.subject: quick local listing idea for 4 Star Roofing & Siding
leads.draftCopy:
Hi 4 Star Roofing & Siding team — I came across a Cedar Rapids public listing for the business, but in the data I checked I did not see a website or phone attached. I would want to verify the best contact details before saying more, but for roofing/siding work that missing click path can make it harder for homeowners to reach you.

If useful, I can prepare a profile cleanup checklist or simple storm/roofing page concept. If this is useful, I can send the details over.
